description: Shared tool-access roles for custom agents in this starter with per-tool and per-agent capability matrix.

read.description: Read files and directories, inspect code, get context from codebase.

search.description: Search codebase with grep, regex, semantic search, and file glob patterns.

edit.description: Create and modify files and directories without restrictions; includes workflow assets and application code depending on agent role.

execute.description: Run terminal commands, tests, validation checks, and external tools to gather evidence and verify work.

todo.description: Create and manage task tracking to organize work, maintain visibility, and preserve session state.

analysis.intent: Gather evidence and reduce uncertainty without editing files. Inspects codebase, docs, and runs verification commands to answer technical questions with confidence.

planning.intent: Create design artifacts, validate assumptions, and prepare implementation-ready plans. Can edit ADRs and planning docs, but does not own application code changes by default.

review.intent: Inspect work and report findings without making changes. Reviews code, architecture, and proposals against repo standards and source-of-truth docs.

implementation.intent: Implement focused changes and validate them with the smallest relevant commands. Can edit application code, tests, and supporting docs; validates changes before handoff.

workflow-maintenance.intent: Update workflow assets such as agents, skills, instructions, and runbooks. Does not run terminal commands; scoped to repo customization files only.

tools.execute-notes: Can run validation commands and checks to confirm findings

architecture-reviewer.scope: Contract alignment, boundary fit, and architectural risk assessment

code-reviewer.scope: Correctness, regressions, maintainability, and test coverage

qa.scope: Test sufficiency, user flow validation, and release-readiness

tools.execute-notes: Can run test and verification commands; does not edit production code

senior-software-engineer.scope: Primary coding, focused changes, validation, and delivery

tools.execute-notes: Full execution access for tests, linting, building, and validation
tools.edit-notes: Can edit application code, tests, docs, and supporting files

tech-planner.scope: Technical direction, design artifacts, ADRs, and phased delivery planning

tools.execute-notes: Can run checks to validate assumptions and gather design evidence
tools.edit-notes: Can edit design artifacts, ADRs, planning docs, and related runbooks; scoped vs application code

tdd-vitest.scope: TDD implementation overlay for Vitest-based strict red-green-refactor loops

tools.execute-notes: Full execution access for Vitest and validation
tools.edit-notes: Can edit application code, tests, and docs

process-improvement.scope: Workflow asset maintenance, instructions, skills, agents, runbooks, and guardrails

tools.edit-notes: Scoped to .github/, docs/runbooks/, and other workflow assets only
